untranslatable_reason: Ascending Broadening Wedge requires detection of two diverging trend lines (highs forming higher highs with increasing spread, lows forming higher lows with increasing spread). Available indicators cannot measure trend line divergence or the broadening angle directly. The pattern requires multi-bar slope analysis and geometric validation beyond point-in-time indicator values. Entry conditions converted as a proxy using narrow range (consolidation), upward movement, and higher highs/lows, but true wedge divergence validation is not achievable.
